description: Global configuration shared across all resources. Loaded into local.defaults alongside data/defaults.yml.
title: Config

ai.description: Default AI model settings used across services that consume LLM APIs.

default_model.description: Default AI model name without provider prefix (e.g. 'deepseek-v4-flash').

default_model_provider.description: Default AI provider name for constructing full provider/model paths (e.g. 'deepseek').

cloudflare.description: Cloudflare account and Zero Trust Access settings used for account-scoped resources.

access.description: Cloudflare Zero Trust Access settings for generating access applications from service routing URLs.

identity_providers.description: Map of IDP alias to Cloudflare display name. Aliases are referenced in service access.allowed_idps; display names are matched against the account's configured identity providers.

additionalProperties.description: Cloudflare display name for this IDP alias.

account_name.description: Cloudflare account name to look up for account-scoped resources.

domains.description: Domain names used to construct server and service FQDNs.

acme.description: Domain used for DNS-01 ACME challenge delegation. _acme-challenge CNAMEs on the external and internal domains point here, allowing a single token to issue certificates for all hostnames.

external.description: Public-facing domain. Server FQDNs are {name}.{region}.{external}; service FQDNs are {service}.{server_fqdn}.

internal.description: Internal Tailscale domain. Used for private service access via Tailscale IPs.

github.description: GitHub organisation and repository names used to push encrypted configuration files.

owner.description: GitHub organisation or user that owns the deployment repositories.

repositories.description: Names of the repositories that store deployment configurations for each platform.

fly.description: Repository for Fly.io service configs (fly.toml, .env, service templates). A GitHub Actions workflow deploys from here.

komodo.description: Repository for Komodo ResourceSync configs (stacks.toml, servers.toml, compose files). Komodo polls this repo.

truenas.description: Repository for TrueNAS service configs (compose.json, app.json, service config files). A GitHub Actions workflow applies these.

networking.description: Network allowlists referenced by services for IP allowlist middleware.

allowlists.description: Named CIDR allowlists used in Traefik IP allowlist middleware labels.

internal.description: CIDR ranges allowed through internal-only middleware.

onepassword.description: 1Password Connect integration settings for storing generated credentials.

vaults.description: 1Password vaults that receive generated credentials, keyed by resource kind. Each entry holds the vault UUID and the tags applied to items written into it.

email.description: Primary contact email address. Used as the sender and recipient for alert emails (e.g. Gatus notifications via Resend).

managed_comment.description: Comment string attached to all Cloudflare DNS records to indicate they are managed by OpenTofu.

name.description: Organisation short name used in resource display names and identifiers.

resend.description: SMTP settings for the Resend email relay used by services that send alerts or notifications.

port.description: SMTP port (e.g. 465 for implicit TLS, 587 for STARTTLS).

username.description: SMTP username. Resend uses 'resend' as the fixed username; the API key is the password.

server_types.description: Metadata for each valid server type, including display labels, icons, and Tailscale tag mappings.

additionalProperties.description: Metadata for a single server type.

icon.description: Homepage icon identifier for this server type.

label.description: Human-readable group label for this server type.

tailscale_tag.description: Tailscale ACL tag name without the tag: prefix.

system.description: Default OS-level settings injected into cloud-init for provisioned servers.

timezone.description: System timezone in tz database format (e.g. 'Australia/Sydney').

tailscale.description: Tailscale network configuration applied when provisioning Tailscale keys.

admin_identities.description: Tailscale identity emails or passkey names granted admin access to the tailnet.

approver_excludes.description: Type keys excluded from auto-approving exit nodes and subnet routes.
